chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَحِيضُ بَعْدَ دُخُولِ وَقْتِ الصَّلَاةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَهَا أَوْ تَطْهُرُ قَبْلَ دُخُولِ وَقْتِهَا فَتَتَوَانَى فِي الْغُسْلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The woman menstruates after the entry of the time of the Salaat, before she had prayed or was clean before the entry of her time and she procrastinates regarding the washing

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/246)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/246)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْحَائِضِ تَطْهُرُ عِنْدَ الْعَصْرِ تُصَلِّي الْأُولَى قَالَ لَا إِنَّمَا تُصَلِّي الصَّلَاةَ الَّتِي تَطْهُرُ عِنْدَهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hajjal, from Sa’alba, from Muammar Bin Yahya who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’farasws about the menstruating woman becoming clean during Al-Asr, ‘Should she pray the former Salaats?’ Heasws said: ‘No. But rather, she should pray the Salaats which there was cleanliness with her’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hajjal from Tha’labah from Mu’ammar ibn Yahya who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a woman experiencing Hayd (menses) becomes clean at the time of al-‘Asr must she perform al-Salah (prayer) before (al-‘Asr)? He (the Imam) said, ‘No, she is required to perform only al-Salah (prayer) in the time of which she has become clean.’”
